title: lean4 mechanical-layer proof witness v0 (raw_77_lean4_proof_witness_v0)
description: Witness row emitted by hexa-bio when the canonical (canon) lean4 mechanical layer reports a proof-state change for one of the F-CL-FORMAL-* formal axes. Scaffold-level v0 — promotes to v1 when canonical theorem names + module paths lock in. See weave/spec/lean4_mechanical_layer_v0.scaffold.md and .roadmap.weave §Falsifier preregister F-CL-FORMAL-1/2/3 + .roadmap.hexa_bio §G GATE-26-2.

axis.description: Formal-axis identifier per .roadmap.weave Falsifier preregister. 1=sigma(6)=12, 2=Landauer monotonicity, 3=Pi^p_2 termination, 4=closure-cert idempotence.

theorem_name.description: lean4 declaration name (lower_snake or camelCase). Examples: sigma_lattice_card, landauer_monotonic, pi_p2_verifier_terminates.

module_path.description: lean4 module dotted path. Example: N6.Weave.LandauerMonotonic.

sorry_count.description: Number of `sorry` placeholders remaining in the proof body. PASS iff 0.

last_modified_cycle.description: Cycle index of the last canonical-side edit to this theorem (consumer reads from canonical metadata).

canonical_repo_ref.description: Pointer into upstream canonical repo. Convention: '<repo-name>@<sha-or-tag>:<path>'. Example: 'canon@a1b2c3d:domains/biology/hexa-weave/lean4/SigmaLatticeCard.lean'.

pass.description: True iff sorry_count == 0. Mirrors deterministic derivation; included for downstream filter convenience.

recorded_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp at which hexa-bio recorded this witness row (consumer-side, not canonical-side).

notes.description: Optional free-form notes (e.g. partial-proof description, dependency on Mathlib version, regression annotation).
